title: Isekai Nonbiri Nouka 2

alternative_titles.en: Farming Life in Another World Season 2

synopsis:
Using his Almighty Farming Tool, Hiraku Machio continues transforming his village into an even livelier community as new residents from across the region find refuge there. As he tends the fields that first brought everyone together, Hiraku gradually takes on a greater role by guiding the village's growth not only as the chief but also as a father, ensuring that each day counts.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
